content: My pytest suite for the ingest package fails at collection time with a fixture error. Can you help me figure out why `db_session` is not found?
Let me look at how the fixture is scoped. A common cause is a `conftest.py` that lives in the wrong directory, so pytest never imports the fixture for those tests. I'll check the layout.

The `db_session` fixture is defined in `tests/integration/conftest.py`, so it is only visible to tests under `integration/`. Your failing tests are in `tests/unit/`. Move the fixture up to `tests/conftest.py` or add a shared conftest.
That was it. Moving it to tests/conftest.py fixed collection.

Good. As a rule: put broadly-shared fixtures in the top-level `tests/conftest.py`, and keep narrowly-scoped ones in the subpackage. Also consider marking the slow DB fixture `scope="session"` so it is not rebuilt per test.
